race.comment: ANDROS (2) is putting together some solid results. Finished third at Ballina two starts back then landed the prize by a head last time out over 1600m at Ballina. Well placed and can score again. GOLD DAZZLER (7) ran on strongly only to just miss last start over 1400m at Thangool. Ready to go one better. BESIEGE (8) raced on the speed when resuming last start but peaked on his run on straightening and faded to finish seventh over 2000m at Warwick. Has the pace to settle in the leading division. Should give backers a sight back in trip. SISTINE CHAPEL (11) last raced two weeks ago when she finished third over 1540m at Gold Coast Poly, beaten 2.25 lengths. Worth including.
